titleStmt.title: SII 24.68: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 68. (A.R. No. 130 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to Irumbuḷaiyuḍaiyāṉ Vēḷāṉ Tillaiyāṉ alias Maḻavarā ••••• under orders of ••• ••• •••• Īśvara-kulakāla-Brahmārāyar for the purchase of garden (tirunandavanappuṟam) to be named Uttamālayaṉ ••••• Dated in the 22nd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇaril lakaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil pon=temiyaḷavu n=taṉnemi naṭappa [viḷaṅku ja]yamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu
matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷam viriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten ticait te
maru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉniyāṭai naṉ nilappāvaiyun tanimai yun tavirap punitar tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉṉaṭi yiraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ven=tar cūṭa munṉai manu
vāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇum tanatu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pū
pālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kaṭāñ cori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭa ta(n)ṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ viṟkulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻai yennuñ col
letir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā likkalan naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇa(l) lūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapa[ttirai ]ṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina vīra
kaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭain toṭa [ viḻun=ta kaṭal] kaḷu n=talaivirit tala ttannāḷukantu tāṉaiyum paṉnāḷiṭṭamum palapalamutukum payantetir māṟa jayap perun tiruvum paḻiyukantu ku
celviyum vaāḷāyiṭṭa [maṭantayariṭṭam ] kari niṟaiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvi kaik kaikkoṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭum pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat
tiruvuḷḷattaṭaintu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅ Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa (ṭa) kaṭal teṉ kaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉai yevip pañcavarayvarum
poruta porkkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi ttuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammaiyum poṟṟi veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijeyastampam ticai toṟu niṟu
tti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭ po maiyyaccayya kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai ye cāveṟellām tani vicumpeṟa māveṟi[ya ]laivarai
kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neritoaiṟu tiṟal koḷ vīrasiṅhāsana ntiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola vīramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai vīrasiṅhāsanattu
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanma[ rāna tribhuvanaccakkaravat] tikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa[ devaṟku yāṇṭu] 2 10 2Āvatu pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷa nāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa śvarakulakālabrahma(rā)
mārāyar Ēvalpaṭi ṣṇavavāriyam ce[ykiṟa ] cakkarapāṇi nampiyum mārakkamaṅkalattu Arikulavāraṇa nampiyum śrīcaṭakopadāsarum Iṭavait tiruvaraṅkamāḷi nampiyum surasa nampiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa
Aṟuvarum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvākkula muṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum pāratāyan kecuvan Aṟivariyānum pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirā Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟupa
venkaṭavan tiruvākkula muṭaiyānum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom puraṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu mu Irumpū
maḻavarā n=tavānappuṟamāka Aṭuttu nilamāvatu keraḷān takavaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu kaṟkuṭi maṇaliṭāy nūṟusamvatsarattin Uṟde
[cam payiru] ceyya Aṇṇā Ayakki Icain=ta kiḻ pāṟke coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattukku nīrpāyum peru vākkālukku meṟkum ten pāṟkellai vāṇa
rāyar tiruttu nilattukku vaṭakku �ṟkellai kattukkuk kiḻakkum lai vāṇarājar tirut tum nilattukkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Araiyum Innilam Arai
yuṅ kallit tiruttaṟat tirutti lattāl nancey varicaiyāl paṇṭāratte paḷḷik koṇṭāṉ marakkālāl [�4] kala nellu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Aḷakkak kaṭavarākavum Innel
nāṟkalamum kār picānam pāti Aḷantu Itil mikutiyānataik koṇṭu Utta mālaiyaneṟṟu Ivar ceyvikkiṟa tiruna[ n=tavanam] ceykiṟa perumpuliyūrt tiru varaṅka Aḷakanum Ivanoṭu ceyyum pi vanattu takkum In nilañ maṟṟep peṟpaṭ kuṭimai ce
yyakkaṭavārallātārākavum Ipparice kalveṭṭuvittuk koḷḷap peruvār kaḷākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Innilam Aṭuttukkuṭutta rumpuḷaiyuṭaiyān veḷān tillai nāna maḻava ṟaṟku Āḻvār kaṉmi pimārakkamaṅkalattān yilāriḷa nampiyum śrīcaṭakopadāsarum Iṭa nampiyum
mpi cun=tarat toḷuṭaiyā nampiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟuvomum paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum kecuvan Aṟi variyānum mutu cirāmanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṟu kaṇakku ciṟṟa yānum śrīvayiṣṇavakkaṇakku veṅkaṭavan tiruvākkulamuṭaiyā Ivvaṉai
koyiṟ kaṇakkuc ciṟṟampūruṭaiyān tillaikkiṟaivan kūttan Eḻuttu Ivai śrī vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvākkula muṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven ciṅkan nen Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Eḻuttu Ivai pāratā yan kūttan tiruveṅkaṭattin Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan tiruvākkula muṭaiyān caṭa
kopan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan cirāma neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkan Eḻuttu Itu śrīvayiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
